CustomField.description: Final Status__c value of the most recent terminal CursorBatch_Job__c run for this config (Completed, Completed with Errors, Failed, or Cancelled). Written best-effort by CursorBatchCompletionHandler; failures here never block job completion.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Final status of the most recent run of this job. Updated automatically by the framework when a run reaches a terminal state.
CustomField.label: Last Job Status
